name: aviator-prompt-optimizer
description: Rewrites and optimizes prompts for OpenText Content Aviator (Olli AI) — transforms casual or ChatGPT-style prompts into prompts optimized for Aviator's Agentic RAG pipeline (semantic search + LLM).

interface.shortDescription: Optimize prompts for OpenText Content Aviator (Olli AI).
interface.longDescription: Teaches the AI agent how to rewrite prompts so they work well with OpenText Content Aviator's Agentic RAG pipeline — which combines semantic search (PG Vector) with an LLM. Unlike ChatGPT, an Aviator prompt has to serve both the retrieval step (keywords) and the generation step (tone, persona, format).
defaultPrompt: Rewrite this for OpenText Content Aviator / Olli AI
Make this RAG prompt work better in Aviator
